title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE CLTO) DISTRICT OFFICE IN THE CITY OF SIPALAY, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
Manila Bulletin, January 12, 2019; 115 OG No. 3, 548 (January 21, 2019)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11156, December 14, 2018 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE CLTO) DISTRICT OFFICE IN THE CITY OF SIPALAY, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by die Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established a district office of the Laud Transportation Office (LTO) in the City of Sipalay, Provmce of Negros Occidental.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of the Department of Transportation (DOTr) shall immediately include in the Department's programs the operationalization. of the LTO District Office in the City of Sipalay, Province of Negros Occidental, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. The Secretary of the DOTr shall issue rules and regulations necessary for the effective implementation of this Act within sixty (60) days from the effectivity of this Act.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on August 14, 2017 and October 1, 2018, respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

DANTE ROBERTO P. MALING

Acting Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: DEC 14 2018

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
